title: Online Exam Integrity Monitor
short_description: A full-stack Django application that monitors exam sessions in real-time using WebSockets, Celery, and webcam snapshots.

key_features.title: Real-time Monitoring
key_features.desc: WebSocket-based live dashboard for examiners to monitor students.

key_features.title: Webcam Snapshots
key_features.desc: Browser MediaDevices API captures periodic snapshots during exams.

key_features.title: PDF Reports
key_features.desc: Auto-generated exam integrity reports via ReportLab.

key_features.title: Dark Mode UI
key_features.desc: Polished interface with custom student and examiner roles.

description: Built as a final-year major project covering the full Django stack including WebSockets, Celery background tasks, Redis, and ReportLab PDF generation.

title: Web-Based Travel Itinerary Planner
short_description: A fully functional web-based travel itinerary planner with real-time travel data, route optimization, and personalized destination recommendations.

key_features.title: Third-Party API Integration
key_features.desc: Integrated multiple APIs for real-time travel data, route optimization, and destination recommendations.

key_features.title: Personalized Itineraries
key_features.desc: Dynamic itinerary suggestions tailored to user preferences and travel goals.

key_features.title: Responsive UI
key_features.desc: Interactive HTML/CSS frontend with seamless backend communication.

key_features.title: Modular Architecture
key_features.desc: Clean, maintainable code with robust error handling and best practices in software design.

description: Designed and developed a fully functional web-based travel itinerary planner utilizing HTML for an interactive user interface and Python for server-side application logic. Integrated multiple third-party APIs for real-time travel data, route optimization, and personalized itinerary suggestions. Collaborated using GitHub for version control and continuous integration.

title: TRACE - Threat Recognition And Cybersecurity Education
short_description: A full-stack cybersecurity platform combining real-time phishing detection, employee training simulations, AI-powered analysis, and an analytics dashboard.

key_features.title: Phishing Email Analysis
key_features.desc: Multi-layered analysis using NLP, URL reputation checking, punycode detection, sender analysis, and attachment scanning.

key_features.title: Phishing Simulations
key_features.desc: Send realistic email, SMS, and QR code phishing simulations to employees with real-time click tracking.

key_features.title: Analytics Dashboard
key_features.desc: Track clicks, devices, departments, and individual performance with charts and visualizations.

key_features.title: SOS Alert System
key_features.desc: Emergency threat reporting and real-time notification system for rapid incident response.

description: TRACE is a comprehensive cybersecurity education and phishing simulation platform. It combines real-time phishing detection with NLP and ML, realistic employee training simulations via email/SMS/QR codes, and an analytics dashboard tracking organizational security posture.
